label: 510 Definitions

children.label: A
children.text: to assess and determine the general condition of the project facility; and

children.label: B
children.text: to estimate the value of property, and the size of the population, that would be at risk if the project facility fails, is breached, or otherwise allows flooding to occur.

children.heading: Project facility
children.label: 2 Project facility
children.text: The term “project facility” means any part or incidental feature of a project, excluding high- and significant-hazard dams, constructed under the Federal reclamation law (the Act of (, chapter 1093), and Acts supplemental to and amendatory of that Act ( et seq.) .June 17, 190232 Stat. 38843 U.S.C. 3711So in original. Probably should be another closing parenthesis before the final period.1

children.heading: Reserved works
children.label: 3 Reserved works
children.text: The term “reserved works” mean any project facility at which the Secretary carries out the operation and maintenance of the project facility.2So in original. Probably should be “means”.2

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 4 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of the Interior, acting through the Commissioner of Reclamation.

children.heading: Transferred works
children.label: 5 Transferred works
children.text: The term “transferred works” means a project facility, the operation and maintenance of which is carried out by a non-Federal entity, under the provisions of a formal operation and maintenance transfer contract.

children.heading: Transferred works operating entity
children.label: 6 Transferred works operating entity
children.text: The term “transferred works operating entity” means the organization which is contractually responsible for operation and maintenance of transferred works.

children.label: A
children.text: intended to ensure the continued safe, dependable, and reliable delivery of authorized project benefits; and

children.label: B
children.text: greater than 10 percent of the contractor’s or the transferred works operating entity’s annual operation and maintenance budget for the facility, or greater than $100,000.
